summary: Frontend-only regression testing completed for mobile/desktop navigation and mobile chart-to-astrologer flow. Desktop navigation is intact. Mobile unauthenticated menu works, but authenticated mobile menu panel did not open in repeated tests after login. Mobile chart selection works, but quick-ask navigation was flaky via standard click in automation (JS click fallback navigated).

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle did not open mobile navigation panel in 3 consecutive runs after successful login.

integration_issues.issue: Selecting Venus context succeeded, but clicking the quick-ask button did not navigate in standard automation click path; JS click fallback did navigate and preserved context draft.

action_items: Investigate authenticated mobile menu toggle flow in AppShell and confirm panel state updates on click for real touch interactions.
Check whether toast/banner overlay (post-login) is intercepting mobile header interactions.
Verify mobile quick-ask button interaction path against overlays/fixed badges and ensure one-tap navigation to /astrologer without fallback.
Re-test on real iOS/Android devices after fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: AppShell mobile menu relies on local mobileMenuOpen state; observed behavior indicates click-to-state transition is not reliable in authenticated mobile runtime conditions.
Top-right toast presentation immediately after login may overlap/compete with header interaction area on small viewports; confirm z-index and pointer-event behavior.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded blueprint user from /app/tests/seed_ai_users.json; no new seed created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated mobile unauthenticated menu panel opens correctly on landing and exposes expected links. After login to blueprint account, mobile menu panel did not open in 3 attempts. Mobile Venus selection card still works. Quick-ask required JS click fallback to navigate to /astrologer in automation; fallback reached astrologer page with Venus-context draft present. Desktop nav links and behavior passed.
rca of the issue: Reproduction (menu): mobile viewport 390x844 -> open /auth -> login blueprint user -> on /dashboard click [data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle-button'] -> [data-testid='mobile-navigation-panel'] never appears across 3 attempts. Reproduction (quick-ask): select Venus from wheel -> selected detail card appears -> click quick-ask button; no route transition in standard click path; JS click triggers transition. Likely contributors: overlay/pointer interception in mobile viewport (post-login toast for menu region; fixed badge/stacking interactions near CTA region) and/or event handling not firing consistently under overlapping layers.
